author: y4rr
content: Result: Sprint B.5.d complete. All 4 issues delivered. #870: Cifar10/Cifar100 from_dir + 13 synthetic fixture files + 25 dataset conformance tests. #871: JPEG lossy tolerance + raw binary round-trip, 12 IO conformance tests. #872: N=10000 distribution-moment tests for RandomFlip/RandomCrop, RNG epoch-baseline fix for thread safety, 56 transform tests stable. #874: IMG_EXTENSIONS verified already correct, no change. Commit d7f957e4. 114 conformance tests passing across all suites. Workspace builds clean, no clippy errors from sprint scope.
